properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 44/25
 1. ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT LAUNCH OPERATIONS FROM 05 MAY TO 11 MAY DAILY FROM 1800-0200 UTC. MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA;

 A. 68-33.00N 013-27.00E
 B. 69-36.00N 006-04.00E
 C. 70-53.00N 005-35.00E
 D. 72-41.00N 007-43.00E
 E. 73-32.00N 012-02.00E
 F. 72-49.00N 017-16.00E
 G. 71-35.00N 018-11.00E
 H. 69-47.00N 016-34.00E
 I. 68-33.00N 013-27.00E

 2. FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON. TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 / +47 76 14 45 87 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN “ANDOEYA SPACE”). E-MAIL MSO@ANDOYASPACE.NO.
 3. FOR FURTHER DETAILS SEE NOTICES TO MARINERS 08/2025  WWW.KARTVERKET.NO/EN/AT-SEA/EFS AND  WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS.
